interface.shortDescription: Document-driven workflows for orientation, review, debugging, contracts, migrations, and delivery.
interface.longDescription: Reusable Codex skills for software engineering workflows: project orientation, code review triage, root-cause debugging, API contract design, data migration planning, and implementation delivery.
defaultPrompt: Start with workflow-bootstrap for non-trivial software engineering tasks.
Use workflow-bootstrap before editing when the task could require orientation, review, debugging, API contract design, data migration planning, or delivery.
Use codebase-orientation to understand a project or module before reviewing or changing it.
